description: This image is a close-up of a satellite photo showing managed grassland in a mountain region of France. The imagery, sourced from Spot 5 satellite with a 2.5 m resolution and a 1/2/3 Band Combination, displays a mosaic of distinct rectangular and linear land parcels. The dominant colours are shades of orange and light green, with variations suggesting different mowing stages or vegetation states. The source is CNES 2011©, distributed by Airbus DS/Spot Image.
